title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: BigBasket is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the BigBasket family as a Full Stack Developer in Faridabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BigBasket:
BigBasket is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Go

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BigBasket!
